title: Property Consultant - Indiabulls Real Estate - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Indiabulls Real Estate - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Indiabulls Real Estate in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Indiabulls Real Estate:
Indiabulls Real Estate is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indiabulls Real Estate!
